name: Command R7B (12-2024)
tagline: 7B-class smallest R-series model with 128K context; tuned for low latency and cost, RAG and tool use; open weights on Hugging Face.
metaDescription: Command R7B (12-2024) (Cohere), released 2024-12-13 — part of the Command R7B line. 7B-class smallest R-series model with 128K context; tuned for low latency a…
overview: Command R7B (12-2024) is a large language model from Cohere, part of the Command R7B line. Released 2024-12-13. Smallest, fastest R-series model for speed- and cost-sensitive deployments.
What's notable in this version: 7B-class smallest R-series model with 128K context; tuned for low latency and cost, RAG and tool use; open weights on Hugging Face.
